description: ACD Harness as MCP server + Claude Code skill — expose harness ops as callable tools

features.name: Create acd-mcp-server.js with MCP handshake and acd_list_projects tool
Add acd_start tool — spawn harness run as detached child process
Add acd_status tool — read harness-status JSON and feature progress
Create Claude Code skill file at ~/.claude/skills/acd.md
Register acd-mcp-server in Claude Desktop config mcpServers
